name: MetLife Stadium
transport: NJ Transit train from Penn Station to Meadowlands Station; ride-share drop-off on Champions Way; extensive bus connections from Port Authority
overview: MetLife Stadium is the centrepiece of the 2026 World Cup and the host of the tournament Final — the most prestigious fixture in world football. Located in the New York/New Jersey metropolitan area, this 82,500-seat open-air arena has hosted Super Bowls, WrestleMania, and international concerts. Every ticket for the Final here will be the most sought-after in sport.
meta_title: MetLife Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to MetLife Stadium for World Cup 2026. Home of the Final. Matches hosted, transport from EWR, hotels in East Rutherford, and seating guide.

name: SoFi Stadium
transport: Metro C Line (Green) to Hawthorne/Lennox Station then shuttle; ride-share via designated zones on Prairie Ave; LA Metro bus connections available
overview: One of the most technologically advanced stadiums ever built, SoFi Stadium in Inglewood hosts World Cup 2026 matches in the entertainment capital of the world. Its striking translucent roof creates a dramatic canopy while flooding the pitch with natural light. The state-of-the-art oval videoboard and seating for over 70,000 make it a spectacular World Cup venue.
meta_title: SoFi Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to SoFi Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from LAX, hotels in Inglewood and Los Angeles, and seating guide.

name: AT&T Stadium
transport: Trinity Railway Express from Dallas Union Station or Fort Worth Central; TRE to CentrePort station with shuttle; ride-share via Collins Street entrance
overview: Known as 'Jerry World', AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas is one of the most iconic sports venues in America. Its retractable roof and gargantuan centre-hung videoboard create an unrivalled atmosphere. With 80,000 seats and the passionate football culture of Texas, this stadium guarantees an electric World Cup experience.
meta_title: AT&T Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to AT&T Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from DFW, hotels in Arlington and Dallas, and seating guide.

name: Levi's Stadium
transport: VTA Light Rail to Great America Station adjacent to stadium; Caltrain from San Francisco with shuttle; Amtrak Capitol Corridor connections
overview: Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara brings World Cup 2026 to the heart of Silicon Valley. Home of the San Francisco 49ers, this modern 68,500-seat venue hosted Super Bowl 50 and the 2019 College Football Playoff Championship. Its open-air design and Bay Area climate provide an ideal setting for world-class football.
meta_title: Levi's Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from SJC, hotels in Santa Clara and San Jose, and seating guide.

name: Arrowhead Stadium
transport: RideKC bus routes to Truman Sports Complex; dedicated shuttle services on match days; ride-share drop-off at designated lots
overview: Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City is legendary for its deafening crowd noise, having held the Guinness World Record for loudest outdoor stadium. Home of the Kansas Chiefs, this 76,416-seat venue is one of the oldest in the tournament but brings an unmatched atmosphere. The passionate Kansas City fanbase will electrify every World Cup match.
meta_title: Arrowhead Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Arrowhead Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from MCI, hotels in Kansas City, and seating guide.

name: Allegiant Stadium
transport: RTC bus Route 115 and express shuttles from the Las Vegas Strip; Las Vegas Monorail with shuttle connection; ride-share via Hacienda Ave drop-off
overview: Allegiant Stadium brings World Cup football to the dazzling Las Vegas Strip. This sleek, 65,000-seat domed venue opened in 2020 and features a striking black exterior with a translucent ETFE roof. Its proximity to world-class hotels, entertainment, and nightlife makes it one of the most exciting destination venues in the tournament.
meta_title: Allegiant Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Allegiant Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from LAS, hotels on the Las Vegas Strip, and seating guide.

name: Empower Field at Mile High
transport: RTD Light Rail to Decatur-Federal Station or Sports Authority Station; RTD bus routes; Denver A Line from airport to Union Station then transfer
overview: Empower Field at Mile High sits at 5,280 feet above sea level, making it the highest-altitude World Cup venue in 2026. Home of the Denver Broncos, this 76,125-seat open-air stadium offers breathtaking views of the Rocky Mountains. The high altitude and thin air can affect ball flight, adding a unique tactical dimension to every match played here.
meta_title: Empower Field at Mile High World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Empower Field at Mile High for World Cup 2026. Denver's mile-high venue, matches hosted, transport from DEN, hotels, and seating guide.

name: Gillette Stadium
transport: MBTA Commuter Rail to Foxborough Station on match days; dedicated shuttle buses from Boston South Station and Braintree; ride-share via Route 1 entrances
overview: Gillette Stadium in Foxborough brings World Cup 2026 to New England, one of America's most passionate sports regions. Home of the New England Patriots and New England Revolution, this 64,628-seat venue has hosted international football regularly including Copa América and CONCACAF Gold Cup matches. Its location offers a quintessential American sports experience.
meta_title: Gillette Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Gillette Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from Boston Logan, hotels in Foxborough, and seating guide.

name: Lincoln Financial Field
transport: SEPTA Broad Street Line to NRG Station (AT&T Station) in the Sports Complex; SEPTA Regional Rail; ride-share via Pattison Avenue entrance
overview: Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia brings World Cup football to one of America's most historic cities. Home of the Philadelphia Eagles, the 'Linc' is known for its intense atmosphere and some of the most passionate fans in American sport. The 69,328-seat open-air stadium sits in the South Philadelphia Sports Complex alongside other major venues.
meta_title: Lincoln Financial Field World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Lincoln Financial Field for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from PHL, hotels in Philadelphia, and seating guide.

name: NRG Stadium
transport: METRORail Red Line to NRG Park/Fanfest Station; METRO bus routes; ride-share via Kirby Drive and Main Street entrances
overview: NRG Stadium in Houston features a retractable roof — essential for combating the intense Texas summer heat during the World Cup. This 72,220-seat venue is the first NFL stadium to feature a retractable roof and has hosted Super Bowls, the NCAA Final Four, and international football matches. Houston's massive Latino community ensures a vibrant atmosphere.
meta_title: NRG Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to NRG Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from IAH, hotels in Houston, and seating guide.

name: Hard Rock Stadium
transport: Tri-Rail to Hard Rock Stadium Station shuttle; Miami-Dade Transit express buses on match days; ride-share via Don Shula Expressway exits
overview: Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens brings World Cup 2026 to South Florida's tropical setting. Extensively renovated with a distinctive canopy roof, it hosts the Miami Dolphins, the Miami Open tennis, and Formula 1's Miami Grand Prix. The 64,767-seat venue is surrounded by Miami's vibrant nightlife, beaches, and Latin culture — making it a fan-favourite destination.
meta_title: Hard Rock Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Hard Rock Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from MIA, hotels in Miami Gardens and Miami Beach, and seating guide.

name: Bank of America Stadium
transport: LYNX Blue Line Light Rail to Stonewall Station; CATS bus routes; ride-share via Mint Street and Graham Street entrances; walkable from Uptown hotels
overview: Bank of America Stadium sits in the heart of Charlotte's Uptown district, making it one of the most accessible and walkable World Cup venues in 2026. Home of the Carolina Panthers, this 74,867-seat open-air stadium is surrounded by restaurants, hotels, and nightlife within walking distance. Charlotte's rapidly growing population and Southern hospitality promise a warm World Cup welcome.
meta_title: Bank of America Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Bank of America Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from CLT, hotels in Charlotte Uptown, and seating guide.

name: Estadio Azteca
transport: Mexico City Metro Line 2 to Tasqueña then Tren Ligero to Estadio Azteca station; Metrobús Line 1; ride-share via Calzada de Tlalpan
overview: Estadio Azteca is the cathedral of world football and the only stadium in history to host two World Cup Finals (1970 and 1986). This legendary 87,523-seat venue in Mexico City will host the Opening Match of the 2026 World Cup, making it the first stadium to feature in three World Cups. Its high altitude (2,240m) and passionate Mexican crowds create an atmosphere unlike anywhere else on Earth.
meta_title: Estadio Azteca World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Estadio Azteca for World Cup 2026. Home of the Opening Match. The only three-time World Cup venue, transport, hotels in Mexico City, and guide.

name: Estadio BBVA
transport: Monterrey Metro Line 1 to Exposición Station then shuttle; Ecovía BRT connections; ride-share via Avenida Pablo Livas
overview: Estadio BBVA in Monterrey is one of the most modern football stadiums in Latin America. Home of C.F. Monterrey (Rayados), this 53,500-seat venue features a striking asymmetric design set against the dramatic backdrop of the Sierra Madre mountains. Its world-class facilities and Monterrey's passionate football culture ensure an electrifying World Cup atmosphere.
meta_title: Estadio BBVA World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Estadio BBVA Monterrey for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from MTY, hotels in Monterrey, and seating guide.

name: BC Place
transport: SkyTrain Canada Line from YVR to Stadium–Chinatown Station (direct); multiple bus routes; SeaBus from North Vancouver with SkyTrain connection
overview: BC Place in downtown Vancouver brings World Cup 2026 to Canada's stunning Pacific coast. This 54,500-seat retractable-roof stadium hosted the 2015 FIFA Women's World Cup Final and is one of the most transit-accessible venues in the tournament — with a SkyTrain station steps from the entrance. Vancouver's mountain-and-ocean backdrop makes it one of the most scenic host cities.
meta_title: BC Place World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to BC Place Vancouver for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from YVR, hotels in downtown Vancouver, and seating guide.

name: BMO Field
transport: GO Transit to Exhibition Station adjacent to venue; TTC streetcar 509 and 504 to Exhibition Loop; UP Express from Pearson to Union Station then GO/TTC
overview: BMO Field in Toronto is Canada's premier football-specific stadium, home to Toronto FC of MLS and the Canadian national team. Located at Exhibition Place on the shores of Lake Ontario, this 45,736-seat venue is the smallest in the tournament but offers an intimate, electric atmosphere. Toronto's multicultural identity and passionate fan culture make it a true World Cup destination.
meta_title: BMO Field World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to BMO Field Toronto for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from YYZ, hotels in downtown Toronto, and seating guide.

name: Estadio Akron
transport: Mi Macro Periférico BRT; ride-share available; special matchday shuttles from city center
overview: Estadio Akron, famous for its volcano-like grass exterior, is one of Mexico's most striking modern stadiums. Located in the Zapopan municipality of Guadalajara, it has hosted the Pan American Games and is the home of Chivas.
meta_title: Estadio Akron World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Estadio Akron in Guadalajara for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport, hotels, and seating guide.

name: Mercedes-Benz Stadium
transport: MARTA to GWCC/CNN Center Station or Vine City Station; easily walkable from downtown hotels
overview: Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta is a marvel of modern architecture, featuring a unique eight-panel retractable roof. Home to Atlanta United and the Falcons, it boasts state-of-the-art amenities and a massive halo board.
meta_title: Mercedes-Benz Stadium World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Mercedes-Benz Stadium for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from ATL, hotels in Atlanta, and seating guide.

name: Lumen Field
transport: Link Light Rail to Stadium Station; Sounder commuter rail; multiple Metro bus routes; short walk from Pioneer Square
overview: Lumen Field provides one of the best home-field advantages in American sports due to its acoustic design, which amplifies crowd noise. Located in downtown Seattle with views of the skyline and Puget Sound.
meta_title: Lumen Field World Cup 2026 — Matches, Hotels & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Complete guide to Lumen Field for World Cup 2026. Matches hosted, transport from SEA, hotels in downtown Seattle, and seating guide.
